name: Faucet Request Routing
query: Fund my wallet with test tokens on Radius.
context: User intent is faucet funding, not direct token transfer or contract interaction.
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is a faucet request
Does not attempt to craft a transfer transaction as substitute funding
Does not prescribe raw JSON-RPC as primary faucet path
Keeps instructions simple for a non-blockchain user
success_criteria: No confusion between faucet and token send operations
